prompt: Review the changes in PR #22217 (branch origin/pr/22217 targeting v18/dev). This is a tiny 3-file backend change to the default webhook payload type.

assertions.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default webhook payload type from the current default to 'Minimal'
Review output is under 150 lines — proportionate to the tiny 3-file, 25-line change
